name: The First Era
defining_tension: Civilizations forming from scattered tribes. The first cities. The first wars. Gods walk closer to the world than they ever will again.
description: The world is young and sharp-edged. People are discovering what it means to live together in numbers larger than a family. Some discoveries are wonderful. Some are terrible. The concept gods are near — you can feel The Deep in every earthquake, The Burn in every forge-fire. Worship gods haven't formed yet. That's about to change.
